test_cases.title: resolveModelForScene returns first candidate when not peak
steps: mock loadConfig to return mockConfig with scenes.coding
mock readCache to return empty cache

test_cases.title: resolveModelForScene skips peak-avoid model
test_cases.description: first candidate peak avoid → returns second candidate
steps: mock loadConfig with zhipu peak config

test_cases.title: resolveModelForScene returns undefined for unknown scene
test_cases.description: scene 'nonexistent' not in config.scenes → undefined + warn log
steps: assert console.warn called with scene not found message

test_cases.title: resolveModelForScene returns undefined when no config
test_cases.description: loadConfig returns null → undefined + warn log

test_cases.title: resolveModelForScene returns undefined when all candidates avoid
test_cases.description: all plans in peak → info log + undefined
steps: mock loadConfig with all plans in peak

test_cases.title: resolveModelForScene respects priority sorting regardless of scene list order
test_cases.description: scenes.coding = ['ds-flash', 'glm-5.1'] but zhipu has priority=1 → returns 'zhipu/glm-5.1'

test_cases.title: resolveModel returns explicit model when opts.model set
resolveModel calls advisor when scene set and no model
resolveModel returns undefined when no model and no scene
resolveModel catches advisor exception and returns undefined
resolveModel returns undefined when advisor returns undefined
test_cases.description: advisor can't find model → fallback to default
